Washout windows matter more than most people track.

TrackMe+ Dose Cycles logs each compound cycle from start to finish: start date, planned duration, washout period. Close out a cycle, rate effectiveness, note any side effects. Over time you build a real record of what worked and when you were ready to start again.

No more guessing. trackmeplus.com

#MedicationTracking #HealthTracking #CompoundTracking #ChronicIllness #WellnessJourney
Meds in one app. Labs in another. Blood pressure in a notebook. Costs in... nowhere, probably.
One lab report is a snapshot. A year of lab reports is a story.
Here's a number most people can't answer off the top of their head: what do you spend on health each month?
Consistent tracking is the difference between reacting to your health and managing it.
53 million Americans are managing someone else's health. A parent's prescriptions. A spouse's lab results. A child's med
